svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="10"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="Jba-OmJd3Rd0Y7cP3jaP"> <mxGraphModel dx="4713" dy="2667" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "graph TB
 %% --- THEME STYLING CONFIGURATIONS ---
 classDef client fill:#1e293b,stroke:#38bdf8,stroke-width:2px,color:#f8fafc;
 classDef supervisor fill:#311042,stroke:#c084fc,stroke-width:3px,color:#f3e8ff;
 classDef worker fill:#0f172a,stroke:#64748b,stroke-width:2px,color:#e2e8f0;
 classDef critical_node fill:#14532d,stroke:#4ade80,stroke-width:2px,color:#f0fdf4;
 classDef engine fill:#7c2d12,stroke:#fb923c,stroke-width:2px,color:#fff7ed;
 classDef pipeline fill:#0369a1,stroke:#0ea5e9,stroke-width:2px,color:#e0f2fe;
 classDef storage fill:#1c1917,stroke:#a8a29e,stroke-width:1px,stroke-dasharray: 4 4,color:#f5f5f4;

 %% --- CLIENT INTERFACE LAYER ---
 subgraph Client_Layer [\"Client Interface Layer\"]
 UI[\"💻 Streamlit Dashboard<br/>(streamlit_app4.py)\"]:::client
 API[\"📡 FastAPI Microservices<br/>(POST /chat)\"]:::client
 end

 %% --- LANGGRAPH CORE ORCHESTRATION ---
 subgraph Orchestration_Layer [\"Orchestration & State Engine (graph.py)\"]
 STATE[(\"State Store: AgentState<br/>• messages: List<br/>• db_results: List[DbQueryResult]<br/>• research_data: List<br/>• blog_post: str\")]:::worker
 
 SUPERVISOR{\"🧠 Supervisor Router Node<br/>(Llama-3.3-70B via Groq)\"}:::supervisor

 NODE_RESEARCH[\"🔍 researcher_agent node<br/>(nodes.py)\"]:::worker
 NODE_DB[\"💾 db_agent node<br/>(nodes.py)\"]:::worker
 NODE_WRITER[\"✍️ writer_agent node<br/>(nodes.py)\"]:::critical_node
 END_GRAPH(((🏁 FINISH))):::supervisor
 end

 %% --- NL2SQL CAPTURE & RE-ACT TOOL EXECUTION SYSTEM ---
 subgraph Execution_Layer [\"Specialized Backend Execution Engines\"]
 RAG_CORE[\"⚡ ShortResearchAgent<br/>(agent5_async.py)\"]:::engine
 REACT_CORE[\"⚙️ AIAgent ReAct Engine<br/>(langchain_agent4.py)<br/>• Evaluates DB Schema Prompt<br/>• Auto-Generates Target SQL Query\"]:::engine
 end

 %% --- DATA PIPELINE & SERIALIZATION FLOW (DEEP DIVE) ---
 subgraph Data_Pipeline [\"High-Performance Data Processing Pipeline\"]
 SQL_GUARD{\"🛡️ AST Security Gateway<br/>(sqlglot Parser)\"}:::critical_node
 DB_ENGINE[\"⚙️ SQLite Connector<br/>(sqlite3.connect)\"]:::pipeline
 DF_TRANSFORM[\"🐼 Pandas Transformation Engine<br/>pd.DataFrame(rows, columns)\"]:::pipeline
 ARROW_TRANSFORM[\"📐 PyArrow Schema Serialization<br/>pa.Table.from_pandas(df)\"]:::pipeline
 end

 %% --- TARGET OUTPUTS & COLD CACHING ---
 subgraph Data_Layer [\"Data Caching & Distribution Formats\"]
 OUT_PARQUET[(\"📦 Apache Parquet Export<br/>(outputs/result.parquet)\")]:::storage
 OUT_CSV[(\"📄 Flat CSV Document<br/>(outputs/result.csv)\")]:::storage
 OUT_STATE[\"🔄 Structured Pydantic Payload<br/>(DbQueryResult -> state.py)\"]:::worker
 UI_DATATABLE[\"📊 Interactive UI Table Canvas<br/>(st.dataframe View Matrix)\"]:::client
 end

 %% --- CORE ARCHITECTURE INTERACTIONS ---
 UI ==>|1. Dispatch Prompt| STATE
 API ==>|1. Dispatch Prompt| STATE
 STATE --> SUPERVISOR

 %% Supervisor Dynamic Allocation Routing
 SUPERVISOR ==>|Route: Collect Context| NODE_RESEARCH
 SUPERVISOR ==>|Route: Introspect Database| NODE_DB
 SUPERVISOR ==>|Route: Final Blog Handoff| NODE_WRITER
 SUPERVISOR ==>|Route: Woven Output Complete| END_GRAPH

 %% State Mutation Feedback Loop
 NODE_RESEARCH ==>|Return Appended State| SUPERVISOR
 NODE_DB ==>|Return Appended State| SUPERVISOR
 NODE_WRITER ==>|Return Appended State| SUPERVISOR

 %% Core Worker Engine Assignments
 NODE_RESEARCH -.-> RAG_CORE
 NODE_DB -. Triggers chat method loop .-> REACT_CORE

 %% --- DETAILED NL2SQL DATA FLOW PIPELINE ---
 REACT_CORE ==>|2. Generates Raw SQL String| SQL_GUARD
 
 SQL_GUARD ==>|Pass: Read-Only Validated| DB_ENGINE
 SQL_GUARD -. Fail: Mutation Detected .-> NODE_DB
 
 DB_ENGINE ==>|3. Extract Row Tuples & Headers| DF_TRANSFORM
 
 %% Parallel Data Serialization Paths
 DF_TRANSFORM ==>|4a. Compress Storage Matrix| ARROW_TRANSFORM
 DF_TRANSFORM ==>|4b. Render Structural CSV| OUT_CSV
 DF_TRANSFORM ==>|4c. Construct State Object| OUT_STATE
 DF_TRANSFORM ==>|4d. Mount Streamlit View Matrix| UI_DATATABLE

 ARROW_TRANSFORM ==>|5. Write Encrypted File| OUT_PARQUET
 OUT_STATE ==>|6. Inject Back into Context| STATE",
 "config": null
}" id="2QJ9DD0fUUfNRnbx0dko-1"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;imageAspect=1;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="2506.8046875" width="1648.9765625" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

color: rgb(248, 250, 252) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

color: rgb(226, 232, 240) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
State Store: AgentState
• messages: List
• db_results: List[DbQueryResult]
• research_data: List
• blog_post: str
